name: Avocado Toast
description: Crunchy sourdough topped with creamy avocado and poached eggs.
steps: Toast the sourdough slices until golden and crisp.
Mash the avocado with lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Poach the eggs in gently simmering water until the whites are set.
Spread the mashed avocado evenly over the toast.
Top each slice with a poached egg.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with chili flakes before serving.

name: Pancakes
description: Fluffy pancakes served with maple syrup.
steps: Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
Whisk milk, egg, and melted butter in another bowl.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and lightly grease it.
Pour batter into the pan and cook until bubbles form on top.
Flip and cook the other side until golden.
Serve warm with maple syrup.

name: French Toast
description: Golden buttery toast dipped in cinnamon egg mixture.
steps: Whisk eggs, milk, cinnamon, sugar, and vanilla in a shallow bowl.
Dip each bread slice into the egg mixture on both sides.
Melt butter in a pan over medium heat.
Cook the bread slices until golden brown on each side.
Serve warm with honey, syrup, or fresh fruit.

name: Egg Benedict
description: Classic brunch dish with poached eggs and hollandaise sauce.
steps: Toast the English muffins until lightly crisp.
Pan-fry the ham or bacon until warm and slightly browned.
Poach the eggs in simmering water until the whites are set.
Whisk egg yolks and lemon juice over gentle heat.
Slowly add melted butter while whisking until the sauce thickens.
Season the hollandaise with salt and cayenne pepper.
Assemble muffins with ham, poached eggs, and hollandaise sauce.

name: Smoothie Bowl
description: Healthy smoothie bowl topped with fresh fruits and granola.
steps: Blend banana, berries, yogurt, milk, and honey until smooth and thick.
Pour the smoothie into a bowl.
Top with granola, fresh fruits, and chia seeds.
Serve immediately while chilled.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
description: Fresh romaine lettuce tossed with creamy Caesar dressing.
steps: Season chicken breasts with salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a pan and cook chicken until fully cooked.
Let the chicken rest, then slice it thinly.
Place chopped romaine lettuce in a large bowl.
Toss with Caesar dressing until evenly coated.
Add sliced chicken, parmesan cheese, and croutons.
Serve immediately.

name: Club Sandwich
description: Triple-layer sandwich loaded with chicken and bacon.
steps: Toast the bread slices until golden.
Cook bacon until crisp.
Spread mayonnaise on each slice of toast.
Layer chicken, bacon, cheese, lettuce, and tomato between the bread slices.
Season lightly with salt and pepper.
Cut into triangles and serve.

name: Pad Thai
description: Thai stir-fried noodles with peanuts and shrimp.
steps: Soak rice noodles according to package instructions.
Mix tamarind paste, fish sauce, and sugar to make the sauce.
Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry shrimp until pink.
Push shrimp aside and scramble the eggs.
Add noodles and sauce, then toss well.
Add bean sprouts and spring onions and stir-fry briefly.
Top with crushed peanuts and serve with lime wedges.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic pizza with mozzarella and basil.
steps: Preheat the oven to high heat.
Roll out the pizza dough on a floured surface.
Spread tomato sauce evenly over the dough.
Top with mozzarella cheese and a pinch of salt.
Bake until the crust is golden and the cheese is bubbling.
Add fresh basil leaves and drizzle with olive oil before serving.

name: Burger Deluxe
description: Juicy beef burger stacked with cheese and lettuce.
steps: Shape ground beef into burger patties.
Season both sides with salt and pepper.
Cook patties in a hot pan or grill until done.
Add cheese on top and let it melt.
Toast the burger buns lightly.
Mix mayonnaise and ketchup for the sauce.
Assemble buns with lettuce, tomato, patty, onion, and sauce.
Serve warm.

name: Sushi Platter
description: Fresh Japanese sushi assortment with salmon and tuna.
steps: Cook sushi rice and let it cool slightly.
Mix rice vinegar, sugar, and salt, then fold into the rice.
Prepare sliced fish, cucumber, and nori sheets.
Shape rice into small portions for nigiri or spread on nori for rolls.
Add fish or fillings and roll tightly if making maki.
Slice rolls with a sharp knife.
Serve with soy sauce, wasabi, and pickled ginger.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Creamy Indian curry infused with aromatic spices.
steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt, salt, chili powder, and garam masala.
Cook the marinated chicken until browned.
Melt butter in a pot and sauté onion, garlic, and ginger.
Add tomato puree and simmer until thickened.
Add chicken and cook until tender.
Stir in cream and simmer for a few minutes.
Adjust seasoning and serve hot.

name: Steak with Vegetables
description: Tender grilled steak served with roasted vegetables.
steps: Season steaks with salt and black pepper.
Toss vegetables with olive oil and a pinch of salt.
Roast or pan-cook the vegetables until tender.
Heat a pan until hot and sear steaks on both sides.
Add garlic and butter, then baste the steaks.
Rest the steaks for a few minutes before slicing.
Serve with roasted vegetables.

name: Salmon Teriyaki
description: Japanese glazed salmon with sweet teriyaki sauce.
steps: Mix soy sauce, mirin, sugar, sake, and ginger to make teriyaki sauce.
Pat salmon fillets dry.
Heat oil in a pan and sear salmon skin-side down.
Flip and cook until nearly done.
Pour in teriyaki sauce and simmer until glossy.
Spoon sauce over the salmon.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve.

name: Pho Bo
description: Vietnamese beef noodle soup with fragrant herbs.
steps: Char onion and ginger until fragrant.
Simmer beef bones and brisket with onion, ginger, star anise, and cinnamon.
Skim the broth regularly for a clear soup.
Cook until the broth is rich and the beef is tender.
Season with fish sauce and salt.
Prepare rice noodles according to package instructions.
Place noodles and sliced beef in bowls.
Pour hot broth over the noodles.
Serve with herbs, bean sprouts, lime, and chili.

name: Shakshuka
description: Middle Eastern baked eggs simmered in spicy tomato sauce.
steps: Heat olive oil in a pan and sauté onion and bell pepper.
Add garlic, cumin, and paprika and cook until fragrant.
Pour in chopped tomatoes and simmer until slightly thickened.
Season with salt and pepper.
Make small wells in the sauce and crack in the eggs.
Cover and cook until the eggs are set.
Garnish with parsley and serve warm.

name: Breakfast Burrito
description: Warm tortilla stuffed with eggs, sausage, and cheese.
steps: Scramble eggs with salt and pepper in butter.
Warm the tortillas in a pan.
Place eggs, sausage, cheese, salsa, and bell pepper in each tortilla.
Fold in the sides and roll tightly into burritos.
Toast the burritos seam-side down until lightly golden.
Serve warm.

name: Croissant Sandwich
description: Buttery croissant layered with ham, cheese, and eggs.
steps: Slice the croissant in half.
Cook the egg in butter and season with salt and pepper.
Warm the ham in the pan.
Place ham, cheese, egg, and lettuce inside the croissant.
Close the sandwich and warm briefly until the cheese softens.
Serve immediately.

name: Bibimbap
description: Korean rice bowl topped with vegetables, beef, and egg.
steps: Season beef with soy sauce and sesame oil, then stir-fry until cooked.
Cook carrot, spinach, bean sprouts, and zucchini separately until tender.
Fry eggs sunny-side up.
Place cooked rice in bowls.
Arrange beef and vegetables over the rice.
Top each bowl with an egg.
Add gochujang and sesame seeds before mixing and serving.

name: Fish Tacos
description: Crispy fish tacos served with cabbage slaw and lime.
steps: Season fish with salt and chili powder.
Coat fish lightly with flour.
Fry fish until golden and crisp.
Mix cabbage, mayonnaise, and lime juice to make slaw.
Warm the tortillas.
Fill tortillas with fish and cabbage slaw.
Serve with lime wedges.

name: Ramen Bowl
description: Japanese noodle soup with rich broth and soft-boiled egg.
steps: Heat broth in a pot and stir in soy sauce and miso paste.
Add mushrooms and simmer until tender.
Cook ramen noodles separately according to package instructions.
Place noodles in serving bowls.
Pour hot broth over the noodles.
Top with sliced meat, soft-boiled eggs, spring onions, and nori.
Serve hot.

name: Falafel Wrap
description: Crispy falafel wrapped with tahini sauce and fresh veggies.
steps: Warm the flatbreads in a pan.
Heat falafel until crisp and warm.
Spread tahini sauce over each wrap.
Add lettuce, tomato, cucumber, falafel, and pickles.
Drizzle with lemon juice.
Roll tightly and serve.

name: Paella
description: Traditional Spanish rice dish loaded with seafood and saffron.
steps: Heat olive oil in a wide pan and sauté onion and garlic.
Add tomato and cook until softened.
Stir in rice and saffron.
Pour in seafood stock and season with salt and pepper.
Simmer without stirring until the rice absorbs most of the liquid.
Add seafood and peas on top.
Cover and cook until seafood is done and rice is tender.
Rest for a few minutes and serve with lemon wedges.

name: Lamb Rogan Josh
description: Slow-cooked lamb curry packed with rich Indian spices.
steps: Heat oil or ghee in a pot and brown the lamb pieces.
Remove lamb and sauté onions until golden.
Add garlic, ginger, and spices and cook until fragrant.
Return lamb to the pot and stir well.
Add yogurt gradually while stirring.
Cover and simmer until lamb is tender.
Adjust seasoning and serve with rice or naan.

name: Beef Stroganoff
description: Creamy Russian beef pasta with mushrooms and herbs.
steps: Cook pasta or noodles according to package instructions.
Season beef with salt and pepper.
Brown beef quickly in butter, then remove from pan.
Sauté onion and mushrooms until softened.
Stir in flour, then add beef stock and simmer until thickened.
Return beef to the pan and stir in sour cream.
Serve over pasta and garnish with parsley.

name: Miso Cod
description: Black cod marinated in sweet savory miso glaze.
steps: Mix miso paste, mirin, sake, and sugar to make the marinade.
Coat cod fillets with the marinade.
Marinate for at least 20 minutes, or longer if possible.
Wipe off excess marinade before cooking.
Sear or bake the cod until caramelized and cooked through.
Garnish with spring onions and serve.

name: Chicken Shawarma
description: Middle Eastern spiced chicken served with garlic sauce.
steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt, lemon juice, garlic, spices, salt, and pepper.
Let it rest for at least 20 minutes.
Cook chicken in a pan or grill until fully cooked and slightly charred.
Slice the chicken into strips.
Warm pita bread.
Serve chicken with garlic sauce and preferred vegetables.

name: Tom Yum Soup
description: Hot and sour Thai soup with shrimp and lemongrass.
steps: Bring stock to a simmer in a pot.
Add lemongrass, kaffir lime leaves, and galangal.
Simmer for a few minutes to release fragrance.
Add mushrooms and shrimp and cook until shrimp turns pink.
Season with fish sauce, lime juice, and chili paste.
Garnish with coriander and serve hot.

name: Lasagna
description: Layered Italian pasta baked with meat sauce and cheese.
steps: Preheat the oven to 180°C.
Heat olive oil and sauté onion and garlic.
Add ground beef and cook until browned.
Stir in tomato sauce and simmer briefly.
Spread a layer of meat sauce in a baking dish.
Layer lasagna sheets, ricotta, meat sauce, and mozzarella.
Repeat layers and finish with mozzarella and parmesan.
Bake until bubbling and golden.
Rest before slicing and serving.

name: Ceviche
description: Fresh seafood marinated in lime juice with herbs and chili.
steps: Place diced fish in a bowl and cover with lime juice.
Refrigerate until the fish turns opaque.
Drain excess lime juice if needed.
Mix in red onion, chili, cucumber, tomato, and coriander.
Season with salt and pepper.
Serve chilled with tortilla chips if desired.
